text:
is Armin Arlelt's grandfather.

Appearance

Grandfather Arlelt is an older man with a rather youthful face, yet very aged hands and body. He has light brown eyes and shaggy, graying brown hair with a beard and mustache that does not connect around his mouth. He is only ever seen wearing a tattered light brown hat, a faded beige sweater with a brown shirt over it and a green scarf.

Personality

Not much is known about Grandfather Arlelt, but it can be implied that he is a joyful person as seen when he is trying to clean a futon until Levi interrupts him.

Story

Grandfather Arlelt is dust-beating a futon on the balcony and singing. This attracts Levi's attention, who approaches and scolds him for dusting the futon incorrectly.
